positive: Intricate celestial fox silhouette against a vibrant, deep teal and cosmic nebula background. The fox is positioned centrally, rearing up in a graceful, dynamic pose. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Abstract Mysticism. Composition: Full-body portrait, highly symmetrical, strong central focus. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting and rim lighting to accentuate the fur outline and fur detail. Color Direction: Deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) contrasted with luminous gold and ethereal white gas cloud elements. Print Details: Clean lines, high contrast black-figure silhouette effect where suitable, designed for smooth transfer onto fabric, vector-like sharpness, UHD, volumetric lighting.
negative: blur, grainy, low resolution, amateur, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature, logo, dirty background, mundane, boring, copyright, celebrity, cartoon, grayscale
